query:
UPDATE storage_objects
             SET status = $1::storage_status,
                 compression = $2::compression_type,
                 original_size_bytes = $3,
                 is_optimized = $4,
                 image_dimensions = $5,
                 meta_data = $6,
                 file_path = $7,
                 mime_type = $8,
                 size_bytes = $9,
                 processing_stage = NULL,
                 updated_at = now()
             WHERE id = $10
